---
title: "Titre de l'article"
author: "Prénom Nom"
author_country: "🇨🇮"
date: "2024-11"
category: data        # data | devops | cloud | ia | cyber | dev
type: article         # article | tutoriel | retour-experience | opinion
source: medium        # medium | linkedin | devto | substack | blog | youtube
external_url: "https://..."
excerpt: "Courte description de l'article en une ou deux phrases."
listing: false
---
